title: HDFC Bank Global Group is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: HDFC Bank Global Group is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
HDFC Bank Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Raipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About HDFC Bank Global Group:
HDFC Bank Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Bank Global Group!
